prompt: I want to start DV on my APB UART block. The spec is at /Users/apple/Documents/DV-Skills/skills/dv-spec-parse/evals/test_specs/apb_uart_spec.md and the project name is apb_uart. Save outputs to the output directory.

assertions.text: dv_spec_summary.md is created in output directory
dv_spec_summary.json is created in output directory

assertions.evidence: Baseline used 9 sections (no dedicated Sub-features section or NEEDS_REVIEW summary section); structure was self-determined, not standardized

assertions.text: JSON file is valid with all required fields populated
assertions.evidence: Baseline JSON used custom schema without needs_review, compliance_standards, or reset_strategy as top-level fields; schema is not compatible with downstream DV skills
All 18 signals including 10 APB signals confirmed

assertions.text: Terminal summary printed with item counts
assertions.evidence: No terminal summary printed; agent returned plain text result without the structured summary block
